case_title: GEORGE APPLEGATE VS. P & S TOWING et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-03-2002 CONTINUED TO MAY-08-2002 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). APR-03-2002 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-10-2002 CONTINUED TO AUG-21-2002 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). JUL-10-2002 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APPLEGATE,GEORGE TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT P & S TOWING ON THE COMPLAINT, SAID DEFENDANT TO HAVE JUDGMENT THEREON FOR $101.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $101.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT, JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF DEFT. P & S TOWING AND AGAINST PLAINTIFF GEORGE APPLEGATE.
PRETRIAL MOTION, DEPT. 212, MOTION FOR ORDER SETTING ASIDE SANCTIONS GRANTED, TENTATIVE ADOPTED. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT PROPOSED ORDER WITHIN FIVE DAYS. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LORETTA NAJERA. (212)
